examples: Because of his special art characteristics, Haizi is often looked upon as a lyricist.
He swept Song of the Year, Best Composer and Best Lyricist for his single Jonathan's Song.
Lyricist Irving Caesar happened to hear him play the piano and thought he resembled his former collaborator George Gershwin.
The Dundonnell project was instigated by the estate's owner, the lyricist, Sir Tim Rice.
Even Koffi Olomide, arguably Congo's most brilliant modern star, a clever lyricist and resonant baritone, is getting lazy.
